title: Wild Adventure
description: A mod trying to simulate the real wild adventure!
body:
Wild Adventure is a adventure mod to simulate the real life.

I add drinking, vitality, temperature... and much than you think!

It will make you more challenging when adventuring Minecraft!

![bar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChocomintSSR/WildAdventure/master/src/main/resources/assets/wild_adventure/pictures/bar.png)
